rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>噢，太厉害了！

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>喔喔！真厲害！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>Whoa. It's like I'm seeing double!<PageBreak>Built in less than no time flat too.<unk[5:0]> This is

<Color=red>ancient power<Color=white>!
